full_name.description: Full name of the person submitting the inquiry

country.description: Country where the buyer is based

product_type.description: Type or category of product they want to source

product_description.description: Detailed description of the product, specifications, and requirements

estimated_quantity.description: Estimated order quantity or MOQ range

target_price.description: Target unit price or budget range

service_needed.description: Primary service the buyer is looking for

message.description: Additional message or context from the buyer

user_id.description: Reference to the user who submitted this inquiry
